description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, surrounded by a low boundary wall and landscaped with several large trees. The structure features large floor-to-ceiling windows, especially prominent on one side, allowing for ample natural light and a strong indoor-outdoor connection. The house includes a spacious driveway leading to the main entrance, which is accentuated by a wide pathway and a subtle overhang. The exterior is finished in light, neutral tones, with a combination of smooth wall surfaces and glass panels. Outdoor seating and patio areas are visible, suggesting spaces for relaxation and social gatherings. The overall layout is open and geometric, with clear zoning for living, dining, and private areas.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a minimalist, open layout surrounded by trees and a low wall. The design emphasizes natural light, outdoor living, and clean architectural lines.
description_view_0: This view shows the rear side of the house, highlighting the flat roof, boundary wall, and several large trees framing the property.
description_view_1: The front view reveals the main entrance, wide driveway, and prominent floor-to-ceiling windows, as well as outdoor seating and patio areas.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the elongated shape of the house, the flat roof, and the arrangement of trees along the boundary.
description_view_3: The opposite front angle displays the main entry pathway, large glass panels, and the open patio area adjacent to the entrance.
attribute_entryway_design: Wide main entry with a flat overhang, broad steps, and large glass doors, set within a minimalist facade.
